title: malus dasyphylla var. domestica
intro: Malus dasyphylla var. domestica, also known as the Chinese crabapple, is a species of apple tree native to East Asia, characterized by its small size and fragrant white flowers. The medicinal properties of Malus dasyphylla var. domestica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Malus dasyphylla var. domestica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and provide a natural remedy for various health issues.
